findings.description: Proposal.md Approaches Considered still has full descriptions for deselected approaches B and C. Per convention, deselected approaches should be demoted to brief entries.
findings.proposed_fix: Shorten Approach B and C to 1-2 sentence summaries under Selected Approach section.

findings.description: No explicit non-goals section in proposal.md. Related concerns like security review phase, Playwright E2E, and Railway staging are implicitly excluded but not documented.
findings.proposed_fix: Add a Non-Goals section listing: security review phase (separate change), Playwright E2E (separate change), Railway staging integration.

findings.description: Task 5.2 (phase_deploy.py) depends on both 1.2 (DockerStack) and 4.2 (NeonBranch). This means wp-integration can't start until wp-neon-branch completes, which is correct per the DAG, but the dependency could be softened by making Neon support optional in phase_deploy initially.
findings.proposed_fix: Consider splitting phase_deploy.py into Docker-only first pass (can ship with wp-stack-launcher) and Neon extension (added by wp-integration). Would increase parallel width.

findings.description: Integration tests 6.1-6.4 require live Docker and/or Neon access. CI pipeline excludes integration tests. These tests may only run locally.
findings.proposed_fix: Document that integration tests in Phase 6 are CI-excluded (marker: integration or e2e). This is by design — they validate the infrastructure itself.
